name: codex-fallback-router
description: Routes Codex Desktop model requests through automatic, fallback, or primary modes.

interface.shortDescription: Automatic or manual Responses API routing for Codex Desktop
interface.longDescription: Runs a local loopback router that preserves the active Codex model and supports automatic quota failover plus persistent manual fallback or primary routing modes.
defaultPrompt: Run the fallback connectivity smoke test.
